revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{hatnote|1={{#if:{{yesno|{{{multiple|}}}}}|This article contains [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Lists#Dynamic lists|dynamic lists]] that|This is a [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Lists#Dynamic lists|dynamic list]] and}} may never be able to satisfy particular standards for completeness. You can help by [[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|adding missing items]] with [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|reliable sources]].}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}||[[Category:Dynamic lists]]}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Dynamic_list here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
